name: City of Rifle Farmer's Market

Products.value: Fresh produce and artisan goods from Western Slope vendors, including local farms, artisan vendors, arts & crafts, food trucks, and beer & wine

Address.value: Heinze Park, 600 Railroad Avenue, Rifle, CO 81650

notes: The on-file website (http://www.rifleco.org/farmersmarket) is dead (404). The market's true official site is https://riflefarmersmarket.com/ (a dedicated market site, not the City of Rifle government site, though the market is City of Rifle-affiliated at Heinze Park). Address on file was '1718 Railroad Ave'; official site states the market location as 'Heinze Park, 600 Railroad Avenue, Rifle CO, 81650' — updated Address field to this clearly-stated location. SNAP/EBT, ADA accessibility, and certified organic status were not mentioned on the official site or its About page, so those fields were omitted. No phone number was listed.
